name: Sandcastle on the Beach
subject: nature/beach
prompt: a tall sandcastle on the sand with two round towers, an arched gate, a little flag on top, a small moat around the base, a bucket and spade resting beside it, and a few seashells scattered nearby

name: Beach Umbrella and Towel
subject: nature/beach
prompt: a large open beach umbrella with wide stripes planted in the sand, a beach towel laid out underneath, a pair of flip-flops and a sun hat beside it, gentle waves and a low sun in the background

name: Cute Beach Ball
subject: nature/beach
prompt: a single big round beach ball with wide curved panels and a friendly cartoon smiley face, resting on smooth sand, very simple bold shapes with lots of open space, easy for little hands

name: Seashell Close-Up
subject: nature/beach
prompt: a large detailed spiral conch seashell shown up close filling the page, deep ridges and curling lines along its surface, a few grains of sand and one tiny starfish resting beside it

name: Palm Tree by the Sea
subject: nature/beach
prompt: a tall curved palm tree leaning over a sandy shore, broad feathery leaves at the top and a couple of coconuts, gentle waves rolling in behind it, a round sun and a few birds in the sky

name: Smiling Starfish
subject: nature/beach
prompt: a chubby cartoon starfish with five rounded arms and a happy smiling face, small bumpy dots across its surface, lying on the sand with a couple of tiny shells nearby

name: Beach Sunset Scene
subject: nature/beach
prompt: a wide beach scene at sunset, a big round sun setting low over the ocean with rays spreading out, rolling waves, two palm trees on one side and a sailboat far out on the water

name: Surfboard in the Sand
subject: nature/beach
prompt: a tall surfboard standing upright stuck into the sand, a wavy stripe pattern down the middle, gentle curling waves breaking behind it, a few seashells and a starfish at its base

name: Bucket and Spade Set
subject: nature/beach
prompt: a simple sand bucket with a curved handle sitting on the sand next to a small spade and a star-shaped sand mold, big bold simple shapes with lots of open space, easy for toddlers

name: Crab on the Sand
subject: nature/beach
prompt: a cheerful round cartoon crab with two big claws raised up and lots of little legs, friendly eyes on short stalks, scuttling across the sand with a couple of small bubbles and shells around it

name: Beach Picnic Scene
subject: nature/beach
prompt: a beach picnic laid out on a checkered blanket on the sand, a basket with fruit and sandwiches, a thermos and cups, an open beach umbrella for shade, gentle waves and gulls in the distance

name: Lighthouse by the Shore
subject: nature/beach
prompt: a tall striped lighthouse standing on a rocky point beside the beach, a bright lamp room at the top with a little railing, waves splashing against the rocks below, a couple of sailboats and birds on the horizon
